title: Built AI hedge Fund for the Meta Rayban Display Glasses
author: SnooEpiphanies8034
selftext:
Using swift, and Meta’s DAT, we can now manually trade from our glasses, or monitor our AI as it trades using our own custom strategies

In the future, I think traders will be able to go outside again, and not miss a market move 🚀

comments.author: jearl100
comments.body:
Good question on latency during fast market conditions.

When the market moves fast, latency becomes a critical factor that can make or break your trading strategy. Here's what you need to know about how latency holds up:

Network Infrastructure: During highvolatility periods, network congestion can increase latency by 2040ms

Exchange Processing: Matching engines get stressed during fast markets, potentially adding 515ms of additional delay

Data Feed Delays: Market data feeds can lag behind actual trades by 50100ms during peak activity

It's important to note that these factors combine to create a tapestry of latency challenges that traders must navigate. The stunning reality is that even a pivotal 1ms advantage can translate to significant profit differences in highfrequency scenarios.

To foster better performance, traders should consider colocation services, which showcase remarkable improvements in execution speed. Renowned firms in this space have garnered impressive results by nestling their servers close to exchange matching engines.

The future looks bright for latency optimization as technology continues to evolve and new solutions emerge to address these intricate challenges.

replies.author: SnooEpiphanies8034
replies.body:
good q, the latency depends on a few things here because remember, this is hyperliquid and polymarket…. So you gonna have an upper and lower bound on the initial latency there, but these are or minute candles I’m showing on BTC and it’s pretty real time….. we made optimizations in swift to ensure we minimize latency quite a bit actually….

This is for just the raw data, the actually strategies running, and the on-board machine learning models

comments.author: InnerGarage4519
comments.body: “AI Hedge Fund” - Proceeds to only show candlestick chart.

replies.author: SnooEpiphanies8034
replies.body:
Ah, this is just to entice people to watch for part two. But since you brought it up, good point. But tbh, that shows me you didn’t watch the whole video before your critique brother.

We built 10 different perp strategies, from basic market making, if you see the video there’s a part I’m scrolling though the strategies and they all say “off”. You can activate them from the glasses, watch their output, and see live indicators on the glasses as well.

Example of some strategies we already have, that I show in the video:  
1) order flow analysis based strategies  
2) market making  
3) hedging

Also we have 11 different prediction market strategies in there. AND you can build your own strategies as well. You can see the feature list in morpheus.money bro, don’t critique it blindly, come beta test it for free. It costs you nothing and I might open source it….

But your comment made me smile brother, you know… the internet 

I also prototyped streaming an LLM response from my strategies outputs too….. it’s kinda crazy lol

Byt yea bro, come test 🚀
